name: Mastering the Markets
overview: The founder of the world’s largest hedge fund. The “Oracle of Wall Street.” Two value-investing visionaries. They predicted shifts no one else saw coming and made money when others blew it on the next big thing. In a new four-part series, learn the most successful strategies of some of the market’s greatest minds—Ray Dalio, Meredith Whitney, Joel Greenblatt, and Seth Klarman—and use their wisdom to start building wealth
